 E_WAIVER3_1 - 12 Monthly Medicaid Waiver Status (3rd type of waiver) see E_WAIVER1_1-12
 E_MEDICAID_RESTRICTED_1 - 12 Monthly Medicaid Restricted Benefits Indicator. January through December 0 - Not Medicaid eligible
1 - Full Medicaid
2 - Restricted Medicaid – alien status
3 - Restricted Dual (QMB/SLMB only)
4 - Restricted – pregnancy-related only 
5 - Restricted – other 
6 - Medicaid – Family Planning only
7 - Medicaid – Alternative Benchmark Equivalent Coverage
